Introduction
One login. Your entire business.
Tapvera CRM replaces disconnected tools with a single, unified platform your whole team can use.
The Login Experience

Every team member gets their own secure login. The system detects their role automatically and loads only the tools and data relevant to them — keeping it simple and focused.

What Tapvera Replaces

Attendance Registers

Digital check-in replaces paper logs with real-time visibility.

Excel Payroll Sheets

Automated salary calculation and instant payslip generation.

WhatsApp & Group Chats

Structured project-specific communication inside the system.

Paper Leave Forms

Digital request, one-click approval, zero paperwork.

Everything at a glance

The main dashboard is your command center. Open it in the morning and you immediately know: who is present, which projects need attention, which leads are waiting, and whether payroll is on track.

  • Live employee attendance counter — no need to call anyone
  • Revenue trend chart updated in real time
  • Pending approvals surfaced automatically on login
  • Actionable alerts — overdue tasks, missed callbacks, pending leaves

What different users see:

Super AdminFull business overview
Manager / AdminTeam & project summary
HRAttendance & payroll status
EmployeeMy tasks & attendance

Employee Management
  • Complete employee profiles — contact, role, department, documents
  • Add or deactivate employees instantly as your team changes
  • Full employee directory searchable by name, role, or department
  • Work history and performance records stored per employee
Attendance & Shifts
  • Digital check-in & check-out — no physical registers
  • Supports morning, evening, night & flexible shift patterns
  • Monthly attendance auto-feeds into payroll calculations
  • Admins can correct attendance records manually when needed

Project Features
  • Project-specific chat & file sharing for each team
  • SEO keyword tracking & backlink management per project

Client Management
  • Each client has a dedicated profile with full history

  • Invoices, remarks, and communications stored per client
  • Bulk emails and automated client updates supported

How the lead system works
  • Add leads in seconds — name, number, source, and notes
  • Assign to a team member; they own the lead from that point
  • Move leads through stages on the visual Kanban board
  • Schedule a callback — it appears on the team calendar
  • Every call note, update, and status change is logged automatically
  • Transfer leads between team members with full history intact

Communication Tools
  • Team chat directly inside the CRM — no external apps
  • Project-specific chat rooms for each client engagement
  • Real-time notifications for approvals, tasks, and updates
  • Company notice board visible to everyone on login

Confidential · Tapvera Technologies Pvt. Ltd. Page 8
Access & Security
The right access for the right people.
Four built-in user roles ensure every team member sees exactly what they need — and nothing more.
Super Admin
Complete control over all settings, employees, data, and financials. Typically the business owner.
Admin
Manages day-to-day operations — projects, payroll, attendance, and leads. Broad access within set limits.
HR
Focused on people management — attendance, leaves, payroll processing. No access to client or sales data.
Employee
Sees only their own data — payslips, attendance, tasks, and assigned projects. Clean, simple, distraction-free.

Tapvera CRM vs. Doing It Manually

Task Without Tapvera With Tapvera CRM
Payslip generation Hours of manual calculation in spreadsheets One click — auto-generated & sent
Attendance tracking Paper registers, prone to disputes & errors Digital, real-time, tamper-proof records
Leave approvals WhatsApp messages, easy to miss or forget Formal digital workflow, one-click approval
Lead follow-ups Mental notes, missed callbacks, lost business Kanban board, scheduled reminders, tracked
Project status Daily update calls & report emails Live dashboard, no manual reporting needed
Client updates Scattered emails, delayed, inconsistent Client portal with real-time progress view

Why Tapvera CRM makes a real difference

Saves Time Every Day

Tasks that took hours — payslips, attendance reports, lead follow-ups — now take minutes or happen automatically. Your team does real work, not admin.

Full Visibility at All Times

See who is present, which projects are on track, which leads need attention, and how much revenue is coming in — from any device, anywhere.

Fewer Mistakes

Automated payroll, digital attendance, and structured workflows eliminate the human errors that come from manual processes and scattered tools.

More Revenue

Every lead is tracked. Every callback is scheduled. Things that used to fall through the cracks — costing you business — are now caught and managed.

Better Team Experience

Employees see their own payslips, apply for leave without chasing anyone, and get their tasks clearly. It builds trust and saves everyone time.

Scales With You

5 employees today or 500 tomorrow — Tapvera CRM handles it. No need to switch tools or re-import data as your business grows.

Tapvera CRM
Confidential · Tapvera Technologies Pvt. Ltd. Page 10

Tapvera CRM is your business, organized.

Running a business means managing people, projects, money, and relationships — all at the same time. Most companies do this across spreadsheets, messaging apps, paper, and memory.

Tapvera CRM brings it all into one place. It gives your team a clear system to work within, your managers real-time visibility, and you — as the business owner — the confidence that nothing is being missed.

It is not just software. It is the operating system for your company.
